description_long: This handbag features a modern, geometric design with a predominantly smooth, white exterior. The body is rectangular with rounded edges and includes two large circular cutouts on one side, adding a unique visual element. A single, rigid handle arches over the top, attached with metallic-looking hardware. The bag appears to have a flap-style closure, with a subtle seam running horizontally across the front. There are no visible decorative elements or branding, giving it a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, semi-rigid material, likely synthetic or treated leather.
description: A minimalist, white handbag with a rigid handle, geometric cutouts, and a smooth, modern finish.
description_view_0: The side view shows the handbag's curved top and the arching handle, with the end panel appearing solid and unadorned.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front face with two large circular cutouts and a horizontal seam, as well as the handle's attachment points.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, showing the solid end panel and the curvature of the top and handle.
description_view_3: The back face displays a large circular cutout, a smaller circular cutout, and a central square detail, with the handle visible above.
attribute_strap_type: single rigid handle, short length, non-adjustable, attached with metal hardware at both ends
attribute_closure_mechanism: flap closure, located at the top front, with a horizontal seam indicating the opening
